title: CPvP Agnes Tachyon Pack + Anime sky
description: This PvP/CPvP resource pack replaces the model textures, GUI, inventory, menu, and sky with a Agnes Tachyon theme.
body:
![Description_png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/056131d8f2643ca4e0fb4201ec1ad775b47b4a7f.png)
# This anime PvP resource pack "Agnes Tachyon" replaces or adds the following features:
- Animated inventory
- Main menu background
- Totem
- Sky overlay
- Custom sword
- Item textures
- Custom GUI
- Small Items
- New widgets
- Enchantment Glint
- Crystals
## The best version for this resource pack is 1.21.x and above.
**On older versions, textures may display incorrectly or be completely missing. 
I will fix this issue soon.**
## For sky overlays to work correctly on Fabric, you will need the following mods:
1. [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/project/YBz7DOs8)
2. [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/project/DWuwk8aA)
### If you have any problems with sky overlay:
1. Check if "Custom Sky" is enabled in your graphics settings.
2. Check other included resource packs, they might be interferin
### If you enjoy this project, consider following!
